Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Nick Golding. Author, copyright holder.

  • Nicholas Tierney. Author, maintainer.

  • Simon Dirmeier. Contributor.

  • Adam Fleischhacker. Contributor.

  • Shirin Glander. Contributor.

  • Martin Ingram. Contributor.

  • Lee Hazel. Contributor.

  • Lionel Hertzog. Contributor.

  • Tiphaine Martin. Contributor.

  • Matt Mulvahill. Contributor.

  • Michael Quinn. Contributor.

  • David Smith. Contributor.

  • Paul Teetor. Contributor.

  • Jian Yen. Contributor.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Golding N (2019). “greta: simple and scalable statistical modelling in R.” Journal of Open Source Software, 4(40), 1601. doi:10.21105/joss.01601. 

@Article{,
  title = {{greta}: simple and scalable statistical modelling in R},
  author = {Nick Golding},
  journal = {Journal of Open Source Software},
  year = {2019},
  volume = {4},
  number = {40},
